children.text: to limit the authority of Congress to exercise legislative authority over the territories pursuant to Article IV, section 3 of the Constitution of the United States;
to authorize the application of (relating to issuance of subpoenas) to judicial officers or employees of territory courts;section 2124(f) of this title
